◎简　　介  

　　The documentary explores the origins of the legend of the Mothman, a creature that haunted rural West Virginia in the 1960s. The most famous event connected to the Mothman is the December 15, 1967 Silver Bridge collapse over the Ohio River between West Virginia and Ohio.
